pred_reason: The contract exhibits integer overflow risks despite SafeMath usage in complex calculations (SWC-101) and uses block.timestamp in operations, making it susceptible to miner manipulation (SWC-107). These vulnerabilities are confirmed across multiple high-severity arithmetic and timestamp-dependent functions. Evidence: SafeMath inconsistencies in _getRate() and _getCurrentSupply() risk overflows; Block.timestamp dependency in critical operations allows miner influence; High-severity findings confirm both arithmetic and timestamp vulnerabilities
